description: Testing scrollbar behavior in data containers

viewpoints.expected_result: Don't display Vertical and Horizontal scroll bar [Base on spec]

viewpoints.condition: Number of records <= Max row of Table/Textarea
viewpoints.expected_result: Don't display Vertical scroll bar [Base on spec]

viewpoints.condition: Number of column <= Max column of Table/Textarea
viewpoints.expected_result: Don't display Horizontal scroll bar [Base on spec]

viewpoints.condition: Number of records > Max row of Table/Textarea
viewpoints.expected_result: Display Vertical scroll bar

viewpoints.condition: Number of column > Max column of Table/Textarea
viewpoints.expected_result: Display Horizontal scroll bar

viewpoints.viewpoint: Check the same of web page
viewpoints.expected_result: Should match web page scrollbar UI

viewpoints.viewpoint: Check the same of web page
viewpoints.expected_result: Should match web page scrollbar behavior

- Focus mouse on Page, scroll mouse
